codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: schema enum includes "definition", $defs/definition_data is present with required term/definition and optional conditions/exceptions, data.oneOf references definition_data, pytest was added to requirements, and schema validator tests were added to cover valid/invalid elements and Draft 2020-12 meta-validation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The python-worker skill mandates tests-first (TDD), but this run implemented schema edits before creating tests while handoff feedback still marked followedProcedure=true; this indicates procedure-adherence signaling is unreliable.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/python-worker/SKILL.md step 3 says "Write tests first (TDD)"; transcript skeleton shows Edit calls to schema/element.schema.json before Create calls for tests/test_schema_validator.py and tests/conftest.py; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true.

summary: Code review passed with no blocking or non-blocking implementation defects found for this feature. One shared-state observation was recorded about skill-procedure adherence reporting.
